WIG Test-Site Selection - global ranking impartially sourced

The 338 contender sites (top ~300 worldwide + 49 India, India tailored to a 3-tonne craft) for a 3-ton electric unmanned WIG demonstrator. Each criterion score is anchored to a cited external human/institutional source (QS, Heritage, WJP, World Port Index, AIS counts, named WIG craft…) and adversarially verified — not an AI's guess. Hard flags apply transparent caps; raw scores remain in the city files.

Priority weights - share of 100% (drag to rebalance)

Every criterion score is anchored to a cited external human/institutional source and adversarially verified; verify berth, recovery, measured traffic, and permits before committing. Charging not required this phase.
Imagery: Esri World Imagery / labels by EOX / Map by Leaflet
